## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (style rule, prompt template, or delivery rule correction)
- [ ] Improvement (better composition patterns, character IP refinement, QA rules)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the `SKILL.md` and my change is consistent with the skill's visual direction
- [ ] If I changed style rules, I've verified they don't conflict with `style-dna.md` or `character-ip.md`
- [ ] If I added example images, they follow the white background, hand-drawn, sparse annotation style
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation if needed
